title: Work in progress
body:
This post is a draft (`published: false`). It renders at `/posts/draft-post` only via the preview channel (`?preview=1`).

It does **not** appear in `/posts`, RSS, sitemap, or any `post-feed` section — even after `/publish`.

To ship it: upsert again with `published: true`, then run `/publish`.

## Why drafts work this way

Posts have two independent gates:

1. The row-level `published` boolean — your decision per post.
2. The drafts/main table promotion — your decision per publish.

Both must be open for the post to be on production. This lets you publish other content without accidentally shipping a half-written post.
